projects.name: Lightweight LLM for Vietnamese Medical Texts
projects.description: Applied Marker technologies to digitize medical documents, Datatrove for data cleaning, and Unsloth to train language models on limited GPU infrastructure, aiming to create an efficient small language model (SLM) capable of understanding and accurately answering Vietnamese medical questions. Responsible for the entire process, including raw data collection, preprocessing, and training implementation.

projects.name: Chatbot Integrated with Agnetic RAG
projects.description: Developed a chatbot integrated with Agnetic RAG using AI Agent frameworks like LangGraph, LangChain, and Elasticsearch. The chatbot is capable of simultaneously querying vector and SQL databases to enhance flexibility and accuracy in information retrieval. Designed the workflow and implemented supporting modules (Indexing, Retrieval, Generation).
